pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requires creating 'Autodesk Maya 2025' and export_result.sh queries for this exact name.
Task description specifies 'with 15 seats' for Autodesk Maya 2025.
Task description specifies 'Purchase Cost: $12,500.00' for Autodesk Maya 2025.
Task description specifies 'Product Key: MAYA-2025-CORP' for Autodesk Maya 2025.
Task description requires renaming the legacy license to 'Autodesk Maya 2023 - Retired'. setup_task.sh creates the legacy license 'Autodesk Maya 2023'.
Task description explicitly requires creating 'Maxon Cinema 4D 2024' and export_result.sh queries for this exact name.
Task description specifies 'with 10 seats' for Maxon Cinema 4D 2024.
Task description specifies 'Purchase Cost: $8,400.00' for Maxon Cinema 4D 2024.
Task description specifies 'Product Key: C4D-2024-CORP' for Maxon Cinema 4D 2024.
Task description requires renaming the legacy license to 'Maxon Cinema 4D R25 - Retired'. setup_task.sh creates the legacy license 'Maxon Cinema 4D R25'.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that all expected software metadata (names, seats, costs, keys) match the explicit instructions in the task description and are dynamically tested via export_result.sh. The initial data (legacy licenses Autodesk Maya 2023 and Maxon Cinema 4D R25, and target users) is synthetically generated and dynamically injected via setup_task.sh.
